query: "gas prices" OR "gasoline prices" OR "oil prices" OR petrol

articles.title: 'Westminster Council gaslit us when we complained our water turned brown and smelled of petrol'
articles.description: The Central London council has apologised for how it handled the incident on a Pimlico estate and has promised a full investigation

articles.title: Slumping AI stocks drag Wall Street lower, oil prices jump
articles.description: Wall Street was on track to close the week with losses as the sell-off of chipmakers and other AI-related shares dragged markets lower.
